message: chore: Remove model files from git tracking (too large for GitHub)

files.patch:
@@ -11,10 +11,9 @@ zig-out/
 *.dll
 *.exe
 
-# Models (tracked by Git LFS - see .gitattributes)
-# *.gguf - now tracked by Git LFS
-# *.bin - now tracked by Git LFS
-# models/ - now tracked by Git LFS
+# Models (too large for GitHub, download separately)
+*.gguf
+models/*.gguf
 
 # IDE
 .vscode/
